The '''''Orthavan''''' was a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] and a sister ship of the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

==History==
During [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], ''Orthavan'' served as [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis's]] flagship of the fifteen warships assigned to protect [[Qat Chrystac/Legends|Qat Chrystac]]. The vessel also served as a temporary headquarters for [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

Under the command of a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Unidentified Orthavan captain|captain]], the ''Orthavan'' took heavy damage while exchanging fire with two [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] during the [[Battle of Qat Chrystac]]. The timely arrival of the [[Cracken Flight Group]] and Bel Iblis's order of an [[A-wing Slash/Legends|A-wing Slash]] allowed for ''Orthavan'' to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="TLC" />
